patch.patch_subject: cpu: rv64: gemm: improve gemm kernel performance by tuning LMUL
patch.commit_message: cpu: rv64: gemm: improve gemm kernel performance by tuning LMUL

thought: Use LMUL dynamic tuning (m1→m8/m4/m2) to maximize vector register utilization in GEMM kernels on RISC-V V extension hardware, adjusting the vector length multiplier based on the number of output columns to balance register pressure and data parallelism
